review_title: Within 3 months all the zippers broke.
review_text: For the ridiculous amount of money Lululemon charges for their products they use by far the cheapest closures I've every seen. Through normal use after 3 months, 2 of the 3 sweatshirts she spent her birthday and Christmas gift money on no longer zip closed. The zipper pulls from the pockets broke off first, then one pocket's zipper's teeth misaligned so it will no longer unzip, and finally the main front zipper's cheap plastic stop completely came off so there is no way to zip it up. Shameful.
business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_text: As a loyal lulu follower for over 15 years, spending thousands of dollars annually, this jacket has been my biggest disappointment. After only a few wears, the defective seam near where the cuffin and thumb hole meet, created a hole. Over the years, I have had countless other styles and materials (Rulu, Luon, etc) with cuffins and never had issues. It’ll be a pass on the Nulu for me moving forward, especially now that lulu is no longer standing by their products either.
business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_text: 2 days later went to wear it. On route to lululemon I noticed there was a large water stain on the hand cuff (see photo). This is the 3rd item I have purchased with water stains. I asked lululemon to return the item for me in store. They said NO that I had to go home wash &dry the item then bring it back. I asked the manager if this was all in the return policy and he said it was. It states “unwashed and unworn”!! They returned it for me after wasting my time & gas money $128 later
business_insight: Support or resolution issue affecting trust and loyalty.

review_title: Serious quality issues and NO customer service
review_text: Serious quality issue. Stitching coming undone on sleeves and multiple pulls throughout different areas of the jacket (not pulling but pulls of fabric coming through!). All of this after literally wearing the jacket for an hour TOPS and not even washing it yet!! The worst part is the customer service. It’s been 11 days about my inquiry into the fabric quality and there has been NO reply whatsoever. I’ve followed up and get a run around message of asking for the same details over and over again without committing to any sort of reply. I otherwise love the jacket and want a resolution but it’s seriously been the customer service (or complete LACK of) that has me flabbergasted and speaks to the apparent “integrity” of this company.
business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_text: This is the 3rd piece of brand now clothing I've purchased from lululemon that has come damaged due to poor quality. Put this jacket on and my husband told me one of the seams had separated revealing a small hole. Ive had this issue before with either that or threads and stitching pulling off as well.
business_insight: Construction quality issue may undermine perceived craftsmanship.

review_title: Beautiful jacket but does not hold up
review_text: i love the look of this jacket and was obsessed with the pink color and rose gold zipper! But I have had this jacket less than a month and have washed it twice - cold, delicate, by itself, and hung to dry. It has seams ripping and pilling in multiple places.
business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_text: I was very excited when the white and gold Nulu jacket was in stock. I’d been eyeballing it forever. After minimal wear and only one wash where I hung to dry, there is already noticeable pilling. I have taken excellent care of this jacket and have the black and gold nulu that I’ve had for years that has zero pilling. I’m not sure what makes this one different, but to say I’ve worn less than ten times (likely less) the pilling is unacceptable for the price.
business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_text: I bought this sweater less than 2 months ago and have worn it under 3 times. I followed the care instructions exactly, yet the seams are unravelling and it’s pilling like crazy. For nearly $160 in Ontario, Canada, this quality is completely unacceptable. The stitching looks cheap and rushed, and the fabric already feels worn out. I’m genuinely disappointed. Lululemon’s quality has gone downhill, and it’s horrific for this price point.
business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_title: DO NOT BUY WALNUT CRUNCH WITHOUT CHECKING IN STORE
review_text: This was my 5th set in the last 30 days but now I’ll never buy lulu again. The walnut crunch define jacket and leggings are completely different colors (leggings are basically olive and the top is a pure brown) but because I already took the tag off (I assumed they would be perfect like my other sets and immediately ripped the tags) they refuse to refund or exchange.
business_insight: Support or resolution issue affecting trust and loyalty.

review_text: The Nulu Define Jacket is very slimming and flattering. I bought the light pink (“strawberry milkshake”) one for my daughter’s birthday at the end of the summer and she loved it so much that she requested another one for Christmas (a grey-blue one with gold accents). So, why am I only giving three stars to an item that we liked so much that we ended up repurchasing? Because it doesn’t last. Despite us washing the jacket exactly as per the instructions on the tag, the fabric pilled after only a few washes. It also stained very easily. The pictures of the light pink jacket here enclosed are after five months of normal wear. I would not have repurchased it myself, but my daughter loves the look of this jacket so much that in the end the purchase was worth it.
business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_title: Too expensive to be falling apart.
review_text: Im giving this 3 stars only because it is sooo cute, extremely soft and comfortable and it truly fits really well. However, I only got to wear it ONE time to the gym before it was noticeably damaged. Isnt wearing it to the gym how its intended to be worn? I would get this again but I will never work out in it again. Stick to just walking or running in it. The stitches and inseams seem to be easily messed up as well.
business_insight: Fit expectation mismatch that may increase return risk.

This was purchased as a Christmas gift for my daughter and I’m glad I looked at it and saw this before wrapping it up!
business_insight: Fulfillment or inspection quality-control issue.

review_title: Comfy but Not What I Expected
review_text: I ordered this jacket in “Porcelain Pink” as it was on sale and the color was cute. Unfortunately, the color is not as pictured—the picture looks like a soft petal pink, but is undeniably pink; the product I received has more of a purple/mauve tone. It’s still very pretty, but I feel the picture is the listing is misleading. Additionally, I have only worn the item once in the week that I’ve had it (and haven’t even washed it yet), but the fabric on the left breast is already pilling and has a patchy texture. Despite the misleading picture, I’m satisfied with the lilac-ish color of the product, and I find it to be just as comfortable and soft as my other define jackets, but I’m just disappointed that this product isn’t holding up well.
business_insight: Mismatch between expectation and product presentation may reduce purchase confidence.

review_title: Went from a 10 to a 0 after first wear
review_text: I was so excited when I tried on this shirt I bought it in 4 different colors, but after one wear there are sweat stains that won't come out. I have never had this happen with any shirt. Ever. And it certainly shouldn't happen with a "sweat wicking" shirt that cost almost $100. I was raving about Lululemon at first, and excited at the prospect of expanding my wardrobe with their products. Sadly my new plan is to return these and go back to having things tailored. Very disappointing.
business_insight: Fit expectation mismatch that may increase return risk.

review_text: This is by far the most disappointing item I have purchased from Lululemon. The material is thin, and after one wash (on cold) and air dry, the shirt has a whole in it. One wash! Not only that, but the shirt is pilling in the back, after one wear. Ridiculous for a $88 shirt. You’d also think Lululemon would read this products reviews and clearly see an issue with the material and overall quality. Many are complaining about the same thing. Take it off the shelves!
business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_text: The evolution polo used to be great. Now every single one I purchase has the shoulders bunched up all pointy. The last one had the collar sewn on crooked and returning it has been a huge hassle with customer service lying to me about sending me a shipping bag just to rush me out of the online chat. They also said I was going to be given a refund with no need to return the defective shirt but then they changed their mind and said I have to return the defective shirt which means I had to take time out of my day to go to the post office. There's also apparently no way to file a complaint against online "educators".
business_insight: Support or resolution issue affecting trust and loyalty.

business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_text: Do NOT buy - I have been a loyal Lululemon customer and have never written a bad review until now - I really liked the fits of their polos so I have purchased quite a few in different colors - 3 of the colors are a white, a bone and a striped crème color polo and all 3 have terrible black armpit stains making them unwearable - the other colors brown, grey and blue have stains but the darker colors help to hide them somewhat - for an athleisure/golf polo I am very disappointed

review_title: Arm pits became discolored after one wear
review_text: I am usually a big fan of Lululemon apparel due to their high quality items. But for some reason this shirt’s armpits became discolored and slightly red after a one time use. I use a very common antiperspirant deodorant and was wearing a white undershirt on that day. I tried to hand wash and then machine wash to get the discoloration off, but it did not work. I have another shirt of this same line (just a darker color) and had no issues with discoloration.
business_insight: Fit expectation mismatch that may increase return risk.

review_title: Low quality and low value for money
review_text: The experience wasn’t great overall. The polo arrived with visible marks and looked like it might have been used. I contacted their support team, but by the time they responded, I had already washed it and started wearing it. The fit runs small, and the fabric quality feels just average. Honestly, I wouldn’t consider buying it again if it didn’t have the brand name on it. Luckily, I received a full credit from Amex—otherwise, I would have returned it.
business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_title: Cheap, nonfunctional zipper ruins perfect jacket
review_text: Great lightweight jacket except for the zipper, which would not stay zipped from the first wear. I purchased this for my husband for a two week trip to Europe and he had nothing but constant problems with the zipper, which is made from plastic. It is difficult to get the double zipper to engage, and then, once zipped, the teeth almost immediately come undone from the bottom up, even though the zipper is still engaged. I expect better quality hardware for the high price paid for a simple rain jacket.
business_insight: Product material or durability concern affecting premium brand trust.

review_title: Warm ash is a different color when it comes in!!
review_text: Color is not accurate to the listing photos. Very disappointed. Very grey green dark in person.
business_insight: Mismatch between expectation and product presentation may reduce purchase confidence.

review_text: I recently received a Pace Breaker Jacket, and I noticed a quality issue. The stitching along the zipper is misaligned and doesn’t match up properly, which makes the front look uneven. I’ve attached a photo for reference. This was meant to be a gift for a friend, so it’s quite surprising and disappointing to see this level of quality control from Lululemon.
business_insight: Fit expectation mismatch that may increase return risk.

review_title: Wanted to like this jacket, but…
review_text: I have A LOT of PB shorts so when I saw that they were making a jacket I was excited. I ended up getting one in black for work and another in red for my days off. Sadly, the quality of the jackets is some of the worst that I’ve encountered from Lulu. The stitching on the wrist of my black jacket has completely unravelled and the zipper of the red jacket broke and it stopped working. Frankly, I’m irritated that I spent over $200 on 2 jackets and they both broke. Would definitely NOT recommend
business_insight: Functional closure failure suggests a product reliability risk.

review_text: As the title says. I had this maybe for 2 days and the bottom zipper stop broke already. So disappointed since I really like the fit and form of this Pace Breaker Jacket.
business_insight: Fit expectation mismatch that may increase return risk.

review_text: I’m a bit concerned about this jacket from Lululemon. The overall quality feels great, but the “LULULEMON” lettering on the sleeve is already lifting and peeling, and I haven’t even washed it once. I take good care of it and wear it lightly, so I’m not sure why this is happening especially at this price point.
business_insight: Fit expectation mismatch that may increase return risk.
